items.briefing:
The Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) has warned that credentials for Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways have been exposed. If your organisation uses Fortinet products, IT teams should treat this as urgent and check for any unauthorised access. Separately, a Cloudflare report highlights that cyberattacks on civil society organisations — including Australian ones — are increasing, meaning charities, advocacy groups, and not-for-profits should not assume they are too small to be targeted.

An IBM study also found many executives lack confidence managing AI-related data sovereignty, a growing concern for Australian training organisations handling sensitive student data.

**Tip:** If your organisation uses Fortinet firewalls or VPNs, contact your IT provider today to confirm credentials have been changed and access logs reviewed.

featured.title: ACSC warns of reported credential exposure affecting Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways
featured.quote: ACSC warns of widespread credential exposure affecting critical Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways nationwide.
